creator: gavin.atkinson@ury.york.ac.uk
text:
Fix mutella build under port lang/gcc41 as requested by kris@
Patch obtained from mutella cvs.

Fix: add the following as /usr/ports/net-p2p/mutella/files/patch-gnushare.h
How-To-Repeat: 	
  CC=/usr/local/bin/gcc41
  CXX=/usr/local/bin/g++41
  cd /usr/ports/net-p2p/mutella
  make all
